steps.title: Identify the contextual signal
steps.content: The text describes the minaret as a feature "almost always included in the designs of mosques" — a defining, characteristic element. The blank needs a word meaning a distinctive, identifying feature.

steps.title: Match the precise word
steps.content:
A hallmark is a distinguishing characteristic — exactly fitting a feature that defines mosque architecture. Rejection, motivation, and duplicate don't describe a defining feature.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
